title: Mellow Earthy Algerian Tortilla Quesadilla
description: A flavorful and earthy Algerian-inspired dish featuring tortillas and a rich mother sauce, perfect for a brunch mood. This ovo-vegetarian friendly recipe is both chewy and satisfying.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat and add the olive oil.
Add the caramelized onions and roasted eggplant to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the mother sauce and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Add the sauce to the skillet and stir to combine with the onion and eggplant mixture.
In a separate pan or griddle, warm the tortillas over medium heat for 1 minute on each side.
Assemble the quesadillas by spooning the sauce mixture onto half of each tortilla and topping with crumbly feta cheese if using.
Fold the tortillas in half to enclose the filling and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
Repeat with the remaining tortillas and filling.
